items.name: 絵入道標
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: This is a historic site, an illustrated stone guidepost. It is town-designated by Yamada Town and was designated on 1 September 1981.

items.name: 六角塔
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: This is a historic site, a hexagonal stone pagoda. It is town-designated by Yamada Town and was designated on 1 September 1981.

items.name: 一里塚
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: This is a historic site, an ichirizuka milestone mound. It is town-designated by Yamada Town and was designated on 1 September 1981.
This is a tangible cultural property in the crafts category, a sword. It is town-designated by Yamada Town and was designated on 25 November 1991.

en.name_en: Hanging Votive Disc of Ogama Kumanosan Shrine
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property in the crafts category, a kakebotoke hanging votive disc. It is town-designated by Yamada Town and was designated on 27 February 2004.

en.name_en: Hanging Votive Disc of Shimada Kumano Shrine
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property in the crafts category, a kakebotoke hanging votive disc. It is town-designated by Yamada Town and was designated on 27 February 2004.

items.name: 牧庵鞭牛碑
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: This is a historic site, a stone monument to Bokuan Bengyu. It is town-designated by Yamada Town and was designated on 1 April 2006.
